assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md, lines 33-41, a 'Deployment Context Lookup' section states: 'The component label pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server maps to source repository rhtpa-backend. From the Source Repositories table in CLAUDE.md:' followed by a table showing rhtpa-backend with Deployment Context 'customer-shipped'. Line 41: 'Deployment context for this CVE: **customer-shipped**'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (labeled 'Step 1 -- Data Extraction'), the 'Deployment Context Lookup' section (lines 33-43) looks up the deployment context for rhtpa-backend from the Source Repositories table and records: 'Deployment context for this CVE: **customer-shipped**'. This is recorded as part of the CVE metadata extraction output alongside the Extracted CVE Metadata table.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md, all four remediation tasks contain a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection nested under '## Implementation Notes': Task 1 (lines 53-55), Task 2 (lines 104-106), Preemptive Task 1 (lines 178-180), Preemptive Task 2 (lines 232-234). Each contains: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: All four Coordination Guidance subsections in remediation.md contain the exact text: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' (lines 55, 106, 180, 234).
